title: adenophora coronopifolia
intro: Adenophora coronopifolia, also known as Bugbane, is a perennial flowering plant native to East Asia and parts of Russia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory issues. Adenophora coronopifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
